_comment: Hermes workflow definitions. WF-01 is complete and provided as a reference. YOUR JOB: Fill in WF-LAB-01 below it.

WF-01._comment: REFERENCE — This workflow is complete. Read it to understand the pattern, then fill in WF-LAB-01 below.
WF-01.name: Demand Signal Refresh

steps.task: MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute DI-12 (Aggregate Data Query Tool) on the study package. Command: python runner/di_12_aggregate_data_query.py <rtsm_file> <ctms_file> <erp_file> <study_config>. Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.

Validate the study package, score data quality, and route the workflow. Output a routing decision: include SIGNIFICANT_DELTA in your output if demand delta meets or exceeds the configured threshold, or MINOR_DELTA if below. Include HALT if validation fails.
Parse RTSM actuals and CTMS plan data. Calculate demand deltas by item and country. Compare to baseline. Apply scenario analysis if SIGNIFICANT_DELTA was signalled.
Generate the Demand Refresh Summary report based on all prior agent outputs.

WF-LAB-01._INSTRUCTIONS: TODO: Fill in this workflow. Give it a name, then define 3-4 steps. Each step needs an agent name and a task description. Use WF-01 above as your guide.
WF-LAB-01.name: TODO — Give your workflow a name e.g. My Demand Check

steps._comment: Step 1 is always the Supervisor running data validation. Copy this step exactly.
steps.task: MANDATORY FIRST STEP: Execute DI-12 (Aggregate Data Query Tool) on the study package. Command: python runner/di_12_aggregate_data_query.py <rtsm_file> <ctms_file> <erp_file> <study_config>. Check overall_data_integrity status: if FAIL, halt immediately and report. If WARNING, log and continue with flag. If PASS, continue to next step.

steps._comment: Step 3: TODO — Choose your third agent. The reporting_agent is a good choice for the final step — they write the summary report.
steps.task: TODO — Describe the task for this agent.

steps._comment: Step 4 is OPTIONAL. Delete this block if you only need 3 steps. Or fill it in to add a fourth agent.
